core_principles: Respect the content: Arabic text must be prominent and legible
Ornamental Minimalism: Use geometric patterns subtly, don't clutter
Tactile Warmth: Use cream/paper textures instead of sterile white
Accessibility: High contrast for reading in various lighting conditions

primary.name: Deep Emerald
primary.description: Primary brand color, used for Arabic text and active states

layout.grid_system: Single column centered layout with max-width container

specs: Border: 1px solid #E5E7EB with an inner gold border (double border effect)

Carousel.dots: Gold active dot, Gray inactive dots

images.description: Subtle geometric pattern for page background. Use with low opacity overlay.
Golden texture for accent elements if needed.

assets.icons: Use lucide-react (BookOpen, Moon, Sun, Copy, Share2, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight)

content_data.title: Dua for Protection
content_data.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
content_data.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shai'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i, wa Huwas-Sami'ul-'Alim.
content_data.translation: С именем Аллаха, с именем Которого ничто не причинит вреда ни на земле, ни на небе, ведь Он — Слышащий, Знающий.

content_data.title: Dua for Forgiveness
content_data.translation: Я прошу прощения у Аллаха и каюсь перед Ним.

content_data.title: Dua for Parents
content_data.translation: Господи! Помилуй их, ведь они растили меня ребенком.

content_data.title: Dua for Good in Both Worlds
content_data.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
content_data.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan waqina 'adhaban-nar.
content_data.translation: Господь наш! Одари нас добром в этом мире и добром в Последней жизни и защити нас от мучений в Огне.

content_data.title: Dua When Leaving Home
content_data.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
content_data.transliteration: Bismillahi, tawakkaltu 'alallahi, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
content_data.translation: С именем Аллаха, я уповаю на Аллаха, и нет мощи и силы ни у кого, кроме Аллаха.

content_data.title: Dua for Sorrow
content_data.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
content_data.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimin.
content_data.translation: Нет божества, кроме Тебя! Пречист Ты! Воистину, я был одним из беззаконников.

content_data.title: Dua Upon Waking Up
content_data.arabic: الْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
content_data.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilaihin-nushur.
content_data.translation: Хвала Аллаху, Который оживил нас после того, как умертвил нас, и к Которому предстоит воскрешение.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
For this specific app, prioritize the 'Amiri' font for Arabic. It is critical for the Islamic look.
Ensure RTL support for the Arabic text blocks (dir='rtl').
